nasb.text: They said, “Moses permitted a man  to write a certificate of divorce and send  her  away.”

esv.text: They said, “Moses allowed a man to write a certificate of divorce and to send her away.”

cnv.text: 他們說：“摩西准許‘人寫了休書就可以休妻’。”

ccb.text: 他们说：“摩西准许人写休书休妻。”

csbs.text: 他们说：“摩西准许人写一份休书就可以休妻。”
